mapper.select: SELECT FORM_ID AS formId, COLUMN_ID AS columnId, COLUMN_TYPE AS columnType, COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, form.COLUMN_NM) AS columnName, COLUMN_SEQ AS columnSort, COLUMN_SIZE AS columnSize, COLUMN_ALIGN AS columnAlign, SYSTEM_CLASS_GROUP AS systemClassGroup, USE_YN AS useYn, MAX_LENGTH AS maxLength, CALL_FUNC AS callFunc, DEFAULT_TEXT AS defaultText, MIN_DATE AS minDate, MAX_DATE AS maxDate, DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, FORMATTER AS formatter, DETAIL_YN AS detailYn, QUERY_ID AS queryId, SEARCH_URL AS searchUrl, COLUMN_HIDDEN AS columnHidden FROM DOCS_FORM_INFO form LEFT JOIN DOCS_LANG lang ON lang.LANG_CD = form.LANG_CD AND lang.LANG_TYPE = #{sessionLang} WHERE FORM_ID = #{formId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COLUMN_SEQ
